sections.name: Dashboard
sections.description: Overview with stat cards, ideas timeline chart, activity feed, and quick actions

sections.name: Projects
sections.description: Project portfolio with search, status indicators, progress bars, and team avatars

sections.name: Workspace
sections.description: Personal notebook editor with sidebar notebook list and rich text editing

sections.name: Kanban Board
sections.description: Four-column board (Backlog, To Do, In Progress, Done) with draggable cards

sections.name: Whiteboard
sections.description: Drawing canvas with pencil/brush/eraser tools, color picker, and brush size

sections.name: Schema Planner
sections.description: Entity-relationship diagram with Rough.js rendering, entity list, and field details

sections.name: Directory Tree
sections.description: Collapsible file tree with expand/collapse all controls

sections.name: Ideas Capture
sections.description: Filterable idea cards with categories (New, Developing, Mature) and tags

sections.name: AI Chat
sections.description: Chat interface with conversation history sidebar and message input

sections.name: Settings
sections.description: Tabbed settings: Profile, Appearance, Notifications, Integrations
